meaning: n.[化]锡,马口铁,罐vt.涂锡于adj.锡制的
examples: Bronze is an alloy of copper and tin.
This tin can hold that one.
Tin is a comparatively easy metal to smelt.
Climbing into a small tin boat, my guide and I rolled out onto Mush Lake.
Star of the show is the 100-year-old wood-and-tin house with old beams, which sleeps up to eight people.
